content: We can reframe Self-Refine, the no-training iterative output refinement framework for LLMs, to integrate multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to eliminate blind spots in single-perspective self-feedback. This creates a fully unsupervised self-improvement loop that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training data or fine-tuning, while fixing the common failure mode of single-loop self-refinement where the model repeats its own uncorrected mistakes.
